case_title: VU NGUYEN VS. JUDY GUAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-28-2019. THE AUG-28-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-07-2019.
